description: Communal accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 11th century. Hand of Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya. Daily construction expenses for 3 Tammuz through 18 Tammuz. Many of the expenses are the same each day. They include the salary of a builder; a carpenter; meals for the workers; and more. (Information in part from FGP.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
